title: Use of own App
excerpt: Is it normal to get asked to pay to use the app i created after the trial has expired?

posts.author: muf711 (Alexandru Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it normal to get asked to pay to use the app i created after the trial has expired?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: If you have monday.com monetization enabled, currently there is no way to exclude the developer’s account from payment request. Maybe in the future, monday.com will include that. The workaround for this is to extend your trial period.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Or grant yourself a 100% discount and “buy” it for $0.
